title: Some Like It... Cold
writer: Jean Bastia, Jean-Daniel Daninos, Guy Lionel
actors: Louis de Funès, Pierre Dudan, Francis Blanche
plot: On his death-bed in 1759, the Marquis de Valmorin writes his will, leaving his vast fortune not to his children but to his descendents in 200 years' time. In 1959, the possible beneficiaries of the will learn that the entire estat...
